subcodes.first_line: In this day all must gaze upon this supreme Word, which is even as the heavens above the ocean of inner meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز کل باید باینکلمه علیا که بمثابه فلک است از برای بحر معانی ناظر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
